title: Budgets, Interest, Loans, and Financial Decisions
description: Compare household plans, emergency savings, credit costs, and loan offers without hiding assumptions. Learners cumulatively produce an explainable household decision model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Classify fixed, variable, periodic, and discretionary cash flows in a time-aligned budget.
Calculate simple interest and distinguish principal, rate, and time units.
Model compound growth by period and distinguish nominal from effective change.
